content: Engineering session started. Task: Implement Kalshi API fixes from research handoff (4 breaking + 8 suboptimal issues). Delegating to Engineering team. Research handoff: phases/kalshi-research/research-handoff.md

Delegated to Engineering Lead: Implement B1-B4 (breaking) and S1-S8 (suboptimal) fixes. Backend Dev implements, Code Reviewer reviews. Domain adapted to projects/arbitrage-trader/crates/arb-kalshi/**. Skipped Frontend Dev and Playwright Tester (Rust backend project).

Implemented all 12 fixes across 6 files. B1: RSA-PSS via BlindedSigningKey. B2: Updated URLs. B3: WS auth via HTTP upgrade headers. B4: Envelope parsing. S1-S6: Dollar string fields. S7: Rate limit reclassification. S8: OrderbookSnapshot. Build clean, 44/44 tests pass.
Reviewed all changes. 33/33 checklist items pass. Found and fixed pre-existing bug: query params were included in signing path. All fixes match research handoff specs. No security concerns.
All fixes implemented and reviewed. Build clean, 44/44 tests pass. One pre-existing bug found and fixed (query params in signing path). No blockers.
Orchestrator verified: cargo build clean, cargo test -p arb-kalshi: 44 passed, 0 failed. Engineering phase complete.
